action.reasoning: Observation: ViT-B/16 augreg reached 18.01% target acc (new best from 12.37%) with source val ~74% after 20 epochs; loss continues declining and val acc still rising slowly at end; ~3.8h for 20 epochs on 4xGPU. Analysis: DINOv2 (strong SSL backbone explicitly listed for DomainNet DG ablations) should yield more robust OOD features for the extreme sketch shift than supervised ViT; higher grayscale prob will better simulate Quickdraw line drawings while keeping other augs. Decision: Switch to DINOv2-B with linear head (86M params, fits limit), edit train for 10 epochs (fits ~2h remaining time), slightly higher grayscale p=0.7 + magnitude=10, lower LR=8e-5 for SSL backbone, then train + submit_eval immediately for updated baseline.
